title: Boundary
description: A positional marker within inline content used to define the boundary of a cross-block range. Boundaries are referenced by their `id` from other nodes (e.g. `Comment.startLocation` and `Comment.endLocation`) to delimit regions that may span across multiple blocks.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.
